_comment: MonitoRSS – All-in-one Pterodactyl egg. Image is built automatically via GitHub Actions.
name: MonitoRSS
author: anton.bystrom@g.scoutante.se
description: All-in-one MonitoRSS Discord RSS bot. Includes MongoDB, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, Redis and all MonitoRSS services in a single container.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
echo 'No file installation needed - all services are baked into the Docker image.'

variables.name: Discord Bot Token
variables.description: Your Discord bot token from the Developer Portal.

variables.name: Discord Client ID
variables.description: Your Discord application's client/application ID.

variables.name: Discord Client Secret
variables.description: Your Discord application's client secret (used for OAuth2 login).

variables.name: Login Redirect URI
variables.description: The URL users are sent to after logging in, e.g. http://YOUR_SERVER_IP:8000

variables.name: Discord OAuth2 Redirect URI
variables.description: Must match what you set in the Discord Developer Portal. e.g. http://YOUR_SERVER_IP:8000/api/v1/discord/callback-v2

variables.name: Session Secret
variables.description: Random string used to sign session cookies. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: Session Salt
variables.description: Random 16-char string. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 8

variables.name: Backend API Port
variables.description: Port the web UI and API will listen on.

variables.name: Default Max User Feeds
variables.description: Maximum number of feeds a user can add.

variables.name: Default Refresh Rate (minutes)
variables.description: How often feeds are checked, in minutes.

variables.name: Data Directory
variables.description: Where MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis and RabbitMQ store their data. Keep the default.

variables.name: SMTP Host
variables.description: SMTP server hostname for email notifications (optional). Example: smtp.gmail.com

variables.name: SMTP Username
variables.description: SMTP username / email address used to authenticate (optional).

variables.name: SMTP Password
variables.description: SMTP password used to authenticate (optional).

variables.name: SMTP From Address
variables.description: The "from" address shown on outgoing notification emails (optional). Example: noreply@yourdomain.com

variables.name: Reddit Client ID
variables.description: Reddit app client ID for Reddit feed auth (optional). Create app at reddit.com/prefs/apps as a web app.

variables.name: Reddit Client Secret
variables.description: Reddit app client secret (optional).

variables.name: Reddit Redirect URI
variables.description: Reddit OAuth2 redirect URI (optional). Must match what you set in your Reddit app. Example: https://yourdomain.com/api/v1/reddit/callback

variables.name: Encryption Key (hex)
variables.description: Random 64-character hex string used for encryption (required for Reddit auth). Generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

variables.name: Bot Status
variables.description: Discord bot status. Options: online, idle, dnd, invisible, offline

variables.name: Bot Activity Type
variables.description: Activity type shown in bot status. Options: playing, streaming, listening, watching, custom_status, competing. Both Activity Type and Activity Name must be set.

variables.name: Bot Activity Name
variables.description: Text shown in bot activity (e.g. "with RSS feeds"). Both Activity Type and Activity Name must be set.

variables.name: Bot Stream URL
variables.description: Stream URL for "streaming" activity type. Must be a Twitch or YouTube URL.
